# GitHub Copilot Instructions

## General Workflow

- After completing any task or making changes, always suggest a meaningful but brief commit message that describes what was done.

## Python Development

- Use `~/.venvs/env3/bin/python` for all Python commands to ensure the correct environment is used.
- Always run `isort` formatter on Python files after making changes to ensure consistent code formatting.
- Always run `black` formatter on Python files after making changes to ensure consistent code formatting.
